title: Raccoon Removal in Rego Park, Queens | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Rego Park, Queens. Licensed experts remove raccoons from homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Rego Park, often found rummaging through garbage near the bustling shops along Queens Boulevard or nesting in attics of the area's many brick apartment buildings and single-family homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal services throughout Rego Park and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians safely remove raccoons, seal entry points, and prevent future infestations with proven wildlife control methods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Rego Park residents and businesses for years with fast, reliable raccoon removal services tailored to the unique needs of Queens properties. Our team uses humane trapping methods, offers same-day emergency response, and provides comprehensive exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Rego Park's mix of garden apartments, co-ops, and homes near LeFrak City and the Rego Center creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially with proximity to tree-lined streets and Forest Park. The neighborhood's mature trees and accessible food sources from restaurants along 63rd Drive make raccoon problems particularly common in spring and fall months.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Rego Park typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon in an accessible area costs less than a family of raccoons in a difficult-to-reach attic requiring extensive exclusion work and cleanup.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Rego Park and Queens. Our team can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours, and we also provide 24/7 emergency response for urgent situations like raccoons inside living spaces or aggressive animals.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Rego Park residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose health and safety risks. They may carry rabies, roundworm, and other diseases, and can become aggressive when cornered or protecting their young. Raccoons also cause property damage by tearing roof shingles, destroying insulation, and contaminating attics with droppings. Professional removal is always recommended over DIY approaches.

faqs.question: What does your raccoon removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive raccoon removal service includes a thorough property inspection, humane trapping and removal of all raccoons, identification and sealing of entry points, attic cleanup and decontamination if needed, damage repair, and preventative exclusion measures. We also offer follow-up visits to ensure no raccoons return and provide warranties on our exclusion work.
